errors.NOT_VERIFIED: Compte yango ezali activé te. Svp activer nanu email na yo.
errors.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Email to mot de passe ya mabe.
errors.USER_NOT_FOUND: Email yango ezwami na système te.
errors.EMAIL_EXISTS: Email yango esi ekomamaki na système.
errors.EMAIL_SEND_FAILED: Message ya activation ekokaki kotindama te. Svp tala adresse email na yo to meka lisusu sima.
errors.ALREADY_VERIFIED: Compte yango esi e activer. Okoki sikoyo kokɔta na site.
errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Lien yango esili. Svp bosenga lien ya sika.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Session esili. Svp bo kota lisusu.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Ozali na ndingisa te ya kokɔta. Svp kota na site.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Ozali na ndingisa te ya kosala mosala oyo.
errors.DEVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Appareil yango ezali na tango oyo te.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: Inventaire ekoki te mpo na kosilisa transaction.
errors.INVALID_QUANTITY: Motango na yango ezali malamu te.
errors.INVALID_PAYMENT: Ba informations ya kofuta ezali ya mabe.
errors.PAYMENT_EXCEEDS_TOTAL: Mosolo oyo efutami eleki facture mobimba.
errors.INVALID_CONTROLLER_COUNT: Motángo ya nguba esengeli kozala kati na 1 mpe 4.
errors.CANNOT_MODIFY_INACTIVE_SESSION: Session oyo ezali kosala te ekoki kobongisama te.
errors.INVALID_ORDER_STATUS: Ezalela ya komande ezali malamu te.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Ekoki te kozala na boyokani na serveur. Sala que serveur esala pe ozala na connexion internet.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: Libunga ya serveur esalemaki. Svp meka lisusu sima.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Ba données oyo okotisi ezali malamu te.
errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Libunga moko oyo bakanisaki te esalemaki.
